productName: Good Tide Passion Fruit Gummies - Indica Rosin + CBD + CBN - 100mg THC : 100mg CBD : 100mg CBN
description: These bright tropical passion fruit gummies taste like they came from a secret candy kitchen: slow-set, fruit-forward, and infused evenly for a smooth edible experience. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift, CBD to keep things calm and balanced, and CBN to help you relax and ease into rest. A dessert-style sativa treat with the kind of flavor that makes dosing feel like a reward.
